release_notes: V14.41 build 185 glucose trend backfill reliability fix: backfilled Nightscout points now merge into the glucose FIFO instead of replacing it, so a partial read can no longer erase older cached trend points (root cause of the trend emptying out after a few hours). Chunked 1-hour reads become the primary backfill for windows above 4h, run newest-first and skip hours already cached. Latest-count and fallback readers are right-sized for their payload limits and use the lightweight parser to halve peak heap use. The backfill-needed check ignores the freshly rolled FIFO head slots, and repeated no-progress backfills back off to a 30-minute retry. Keeps the selectable 1/2/3/4/6/8/10/12-hour trend windows and 5-minute FIFO rolling from build 184.
